lines.text: Typhoon Lagoon Umbrellas - Typhoon Lagoon Water Park | Walt Disney World Resort
Create your own mini oasis with a beach umbrella, comfortable lounge chairs and more!
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
You’ll Have It Made in the Shade
Find the perfect spot to relax! When you rent a Typhoon Lagoon Umbrella, you’ll have all-day access to:
This cool upgrade accommodates up to 4 Guests. Typhoon Lagoon Umbrella rentals can be found near the Typhoon Lagoon Surf Pool.
Advance reservations are highly recommended as Typhoon Lagoon Umbrellas book quickly—and are available on a first-come, first-served basis.
To inquire about same-day availability, please visit the podiums at the main entrance near Disney transportation drop off before 11:00 AM. All guests can check in at Singapore Sal’s after 11:00 AM.
Prices for Typhoon Lagoon Umbrellas vary based on date—and range from $49 to $109 per day, plus tax.
Valid water park admission is required.
One Guest in the party must be at least 18 years old.

Guests who need to cancel Typhoon Lagoon Umbrellas reservations must provide 24-hour advance notice. The full price of your reservation will be charged in the event of no-shows or same-day cancellations.
Rentals may be cancelled by the water park due to inclement weather. If this occurs, Guests will not be charged.
Operating hours and the availability of amenities may change without notice. Please check at the time of booking to confirm what will be provided.
Relax in your own private shaded area with cushioned seating, a cooler and more at Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon water park.
